marketing.heroTitle: Run your school with clarity and confidence
marketing.heroSubtitle: FOBS SMS brings enrollment, attendance, marks, report cards and parent communication into one calm, dependable platform — built for Cameroonian schools.
marketing.feature1Body: Register students, manage classes and sections, and import rosters in seconds.
marketing.feature2Body: Enter marks per sequence and generate GCE- and MINESEC-ready report cards.
marketing.feature3Body: Track attendance and keep parents informed on their child's progress.

mockGce.title: Mock GCE Examination
mockGce.subtitle: Generate Cameroon GCE-style mock result slips and summaries for Form 5 (Ordinary Level) and Upper Sixth (Advanced Level) candidates, based on the 6th-sequence marks.
mockGce.disclaimer: Mock GCE slips are internal evaluation documents and are NOT official Cameroon GCE Board results.

passRule.o: Pass rule: A, B or C in ≥ 4 papers. Points: A=3, B=2, C=1.
passRule.a: Pass rule: A through E in ≥ 2 papers. Points: A=5, B=4, C=3, D=2, E=1.

info.title: How this works
points: Teachers enter sequence-6 marks /20 in the usual mark-sheets flow.
This page converts those marks to Cameroon GCE letter grades and tallies passes and points.
The standard term, sequence and result-summary reports are unaffected.

empty.title: No GCE classes found
empty.description: The Mock GCE page works with classes named Form 5, Form Five, Upper Sixth or U6. Create or rename a class under Classes to enable this feature.

error.title: Couldn't load Mock GCE
error.description: Something went wrong while loading the eligible classes.

toasts.slipsFailed: Couldn't download the result slips. Please try again.
